narrative:
Blackcreek Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 383 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.8 percentage points.
